title: Pitch Deck Outline
note: A slide-by-slide outline for the investor deck, pulling from across the repository. Built on the wager stated throughout: rigorous honesty is more fundable than polished optimism, for the right investor. Each slide names its source file and the ONE thing it must accomplish.

deck_philosophy.principle: Lead with the inflection, sell the checkable ROI, volunteer the risks, and never overclaim the predictive capability.
deck_philosophy.the_arc: This industry just became the majority of the world's aquatic animal production → its operators are blind to the thing that kills their stock → the blindness is economic, not technical → an aerial platform inverts that economics → here is the one thing we must prove and how we'll prove it cheaply → here is the boring ROI that pays for it meanwhile.
what_this_deck_refuses_to_do: Claim we prevent fish kills before validation

slides.title: Title
slides.must_accomplish: Name, the mark, one line: 'We make the water legible to the people who farm it.'
slides.visual: The logo mark — it encodes aerial-view + seeing-beneath-water in one glyph. Use it.

slides.title: The Inflection
slides.must_accomplish: In 2022 aquaculture passed capture fisheries for the first time — 51% of aquatic animal production. The centre of the industry is now a farmed, instrumentable system. Say it once, let it land.

slides.title: The Problem
slides.must_accomplish: Operators make bet-the-year decisions about a 3D chemical environment they cannot see, using surface readings taken at the safest time of day. Fish die because of a monitoring gap.

slides.title: It's Real, Recurring, and Costly
slides.must_accomplish: Documented Philippine kills: 343 t at Taal, 600+ t / PHP 43M elsewhere, and the mechanism is known — DO depletion plus post-overturn ammonia and sulfide.
slides.caveat: Present losses honestly — do not inflate. The recurrence is the argument, not any single tonnage.

slides.title: Why Nobody Sees It Coming
slides.must_accomplish: Two blindnesses: TIME (the DO minimum is pre-dawn when nobody's out) and DEPTH (the killer sits below the thermocline). Show both charts side by side.

slides.title: The Reframe
slides.must_accomplish: The bottleneck isn't sensors — it's the marginal LABOUR cost of an observation. That's a logistics problem with an aerial answer. This is the intellectual core.

slides.title: The Solution
slides.must_accomplish: OmniDrone: profile at depth, scan the surface, dispense a response, feed it to a twin. Show the render.
slides.visual: The product render + the four functions.

slides.title: The Insight That Makes It Defensible
slides.must_accomplish: The probe and the camera are one instrument: the drone carries its own ground truth, so it calibrates its own imagery in a single sortie. That's what nobody else does.

slides.title: A Day in the Life
slides.must_accomplish: The narrative: 04:30 sortie finds the loaded gun, manager acts with a chart instead of a feeling, fish survive. Note it's a storyboard, not a testimonial.

slides.title: How We Sell — The Checkable ROI
slides.must_accomplish: Lead with aeration-electricity savings: metered, budgeted, verifiable in ONE cycle without believing our modelling. Fish-kill prevention is upside, not the pitch.

slides.title: Market & Beachhead
slides.must_accomplish: 70% of production is in Asia, 62.6% inland — our exact environment. Beachhead: dense-cluster Philippine lake cages. Show the method for sizing, and name the BFAR data we still need.
slides.caveat: Do NOT show a fabricated TAM. Show the method and the missing input — it's more credible.

slides.title: Competition — Honestly
slides.must_accomplish: We win on depth+space+imaging, lose on continuity+weather+cost. The hybrid with a fixed buoy beats either alone, and that's our roadmap. Volunteering this wins trust.

slides.title: Where We Actually Are
slides.must_accomplish: TRL 3. Nothing has flown. Here's the evidence-gated path up, with kill criteria. Owning this is the credibility move of the whole deck.

slides.title: The Risks We're Not Hiding
slides.must_accomplish: BVLOS dependency, weather grounding, affordability paradox, USV alternative, unproven unit economics — each with a mitigation. This slide is the deck's spine.

slides.title: The Ask
slides.must_accomplish: Fund Phase 0 — the cheap phase that de-risks the most and can honestly trigger a stop. Milestone-gated tranches, not a lump against a forecast.

slides.title: Why This Team, Why Now
slides.must_accomplish: Real founder credentials (must be written by the founders, never invented) + the technology and market timing. Then the mission: mass mortality anticipated, not mourned.
slides.caveat: The team slide MUST use real, verifiable biographies. Fabricated credentials end raises.

the_appendix_slides.note: Held in reserve for the questions you know are coming.

the_two_versions.the_5_minute_version: Slides 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 10, 13, 15. The inflection, the two blindnesses, the insight, the checkable ROI, honest TRL, the ask.
the_two_versions.the_owner_version: For the absentee farm owner (see customer-personas.json): ONE slide — payback period on aeration savings. Different artefact entirely; no water chemistry.
the_two_versions.the_impact_version: Add the SDG alignment WITH its tensions, the occupational-safety argument, and the equity commitment. See sdg-alignment.json.
